title: Delicious Deep-Fried Andalusian Fish Croquetas
description: A crispy and flavorful Spanish dish featuring fish, sultanas, and a perfect blend of spices. Ideal for a post-workout snack or light meal.
instructions: Cut the cod fish into small pieces and mash it in a bowl using a fork.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, breadcrumbs, eggs, grated onion, crispy sultanas, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fish pieces to the bowl and mix everything together until well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small cylindrical shapes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, carefully place the fish croquetas into the pan and fry until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, carefully remove the croquetas from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the deep-fried Andalusian fish croquetas hot and enjoy!
